title: CSA CCM v4 to Azure Security Services Cross-Reference
description: Maps CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4 domains to Microsoft Azure security services and features that implement or support each domain's control objectives. Use to identify which Azure services satisfy CCM requirements for cloud security assessments.
verificationNote: Azure service mappings are based on publicly documented service capabilities as of 2025. Azure services evolve frequently -- verify current capabilities against Microsoft documentation. Not endorsed by CSA or Microsoft.

azureServices.description: Compliance assessment and management with pre-built templates for ISO 27001, SOC 2, GDPR, PCI DSS. Implements A&A-01 (audit planning) and A&A-05 (regulatory mapping).
Policy-based compliance enforcement and auditing. Built-in compliance initiative definitions. Supports A&A-03 (risk-based planning).
Access to Microsoft compliance reports (SOC 2, ISO 27001, PCI DSS). Supports A&A-05.
Code-to-cloud security with SAST, secrets scanning, and IaC scanning. Implements AIS-02 (application security testing).

azureServices.service: Azure WAF (Application Gateway WAF / Front Door WAF)
azureServices.description: Web Application Firewall with OWASP 3.2 managed rule sets. Implements AIS-01 (application security) for web apps.
Managed API gateway with throttling, OAuth 2.0, request validation, and subscription keys. Supports AIS-04 (secure application design).
CI/CD with integrated security scanning (Dependabot, CodeQL, secret scanning). Supports AIS-02.
Centralised backup for VMs, SQL, files, and Kubernetes. Cross-region backup vault. Implements BCR-01 and BCR-04.
Disaster recovery orchestration with automated failover and failback. Implements BCR-02 (business continuity testing).
WORM-compliant immutable storage for backup protection. Implements BCR-04 (backup integrity).
Infrastructure redundancy for high availability and DR. Supports BCR-01.
Policy enforcement for resource configuration compliance. Deny, audit, and remediation effects. Implements CCC-03 (configuration management).
Infrastructure as Code for controlled deployments. Implements CCC-01 (change management) through code-based changes.
Automated patching and configuration management. Supports CCC-03.
Repeatable environment provisioning with governance constraints. Supports CCC-02 (quality testing) through pre-approved configurations.
Customer-managed key, secret, and certificate management. HSM-backed keys available. Implements EKM-01 through EKM-04.
FIPS 140-2 Level 3 dedicated HSM for cryptographic key storage. Implements EKM-02 for highest assurance.

azureServices.service: Azure Disk Encryption / Storage Service Encryption
azureServices.description: Encryption at rest with Azure-managed or customer-managed keys. Implements DSP-01.

azureServices.service: Azure App Service TLS / Application Gateway SSL
azureServices.description: TLS termination and enforcement. Implements DSP-02 (encryption in transit).
Automated data discovery, classification, and labelling across Azure services. Implements DSP-01 (data classification).
DLP for Microsoft 365, Teams, SharePoint, and Exchange. Implements DSP-02 (data protection) and DSP-05 (data flow control).
Document-level classification and protection with persistent encryption. Supports DSP-01.
Resource location restriction policy. Implements DSP-06 (data residency) by preventing resource creation outside approved regions.
Automated tiering, retention, and deletion policies. Implements DSP-17 (data retention).

azureServices.service: Microsoft Service Trust Portal (SOC 2 / ISO 27001 reports)
azureServices.description: Datacenter physical security is a Microsoft responsibility. Customers verify via SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 reports covering physical access controls, environmental protections, and equipment security. Maps to DCS-01 through DCS-09.
Azure datacenters comply with SOC 1/2/3, ISO 27001, ISO 27017, PCI DSS, and FedRAMP — all of which include physical security audit scope.
Hierarchical governance structure for subscriptions. Policy inheritance. Implements GRC-01 (governance programme).
Compliance dashboard against ISO 27001, PCI DSS, SOC 2, CIS benchmarks. Supports GRC-02 (risk management).
Prescriptive architecture with built-in governance, security, and networking. Implements GRC-01 and GRC-03.
Core identity platform. Users, groups, conditional access, app registrations. Implements IAM-01, IAM-02, IAM-04.
Just-in-time privileged access with approval workflows and time-limited elevation. Implements IAM-02, IAM-06, IAM-09.
Risk-based access policies evaluating user, device, location, and risk signals. Implements IAM-12 (access control).
ML-based identity threat detection (risky sign-ins, compromised credentials). Implements IAM-12.
Managed identity for Azure resources eliminating credential management. Implements IAM-10.
Virtual network with subnets, NSGs, ASGs, and VNet peering. Implements IVS-01 (network security) and IVS-06 (segmentation).
Volumetric and protocol DDoS protection with mitigation metrics. Implements IVS-04.
Managed cloud firewall with TLS inspection, IDPS, and URL filtering. Implements IVS-01 and IVS-04.
CSPM and CWPP with security recommendations, threat detection, and vulnerability assessment. Implements IVS-09.
Private connectivity to Azure PaaS services without public internet. Implements IVS-06.
Subscription-level management plane logging. Implements LOG-01 (logging policy).
Cloud-native SIEM and SOAR with ML-based detection, hunting, and automated response. Implements LOG-03 (monitoring) and LOG-13 (alerting).
Centralised log collection, query, and analysis. Implements LOG-02 (log centralisation).
Network traffic logging for NSGs. Implements LOG-01 for network visibility.
Tamper-proof log storage with WORM compliance. Implements LOG-05 (log integrity and retention).

mappings.ccmDomainName: Security Incident Management, E-Discovery, & Cloud Forensics

azureServices.description: Incident management with case management, playbooks (Logic Apps), and automated response. Implements SEF-01 and SEF-02.
Threat detection and security alerting across Azure resources. Supports SEF-01.
Legal hold and eDiscovery for Microsoft 365 content. Supports SEF cloud forensics.

azureServices.service: Azure Disk Snapshots for forensic preservation
azureServices.description: VM disk snapshots for forensic evidence preservation. Supports cloud forensics capability.
Access to Microsoft compliance documentation and audit reports. Supports STA-05 (vendor audit).
Private container registry with vulnerability scanning (Defender for Containers). Supports STA-06.
Vetted third-party software and services marketplace. Supports STA-01.
Automated dependency vulnerability scanning and updates. Supports STA-06 (supply chain security).
Cloud security posture management with vulnerability assessment and security recommendations. Implements TVM-01 and TVM-02.
Continuous vulnerability assessment for VMs, containers, and applications. Implements TVM-01.
Automated OS patching and update compliance. Implements TVM-01 (vulnerability remediation).
Threat intelligence feeds and indicators. Implements TVM-06 (threat intelligence).
Mobile device and endpoint management with compliance policies. Implements UEM controls for device trust and security.
Device compliance-based access policies for cloud services. Supports UEM through device trust evaluation.
Managed virtual desktop infrastructure with security controls. Supports UEM through controlled endpoint environments.
